    else if n = 3 then 3

    unfold sol

        have : n ≥ 5 := by linarith
        apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.add_le_add_right (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.div_le_self _ _)) _)
        linarith
      · apply ih; constructor; linarith; linarith
        exact Nat.div_lt_self (by linarith) (by linarith)

  native_decide

          simp [g, Nat.digits_def]
          have : (4*m+1)%2 = 1 := by omega
          have : (4*m+1)/2 = 2*m := by omega
          have : (2*m)%2 = 0 := by omega
          have : (2*m)/2 = m := by omega
          have : (2*m+1)%2 = 1 := by omega
          have : (2*m+1)/2 = m := by omega
          simp [this, Nat.digits_def]
          simp [List.reverse_cons, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]
          ring
        else
          let m := k / 2
          have : n = 4 * m + 3 := by 
             rw [h_odd]
             have : k = 2 * m + 1 := (Nat.div_eq_of_mod_eq_zero (Nat.mod_two_ne_zero.mp hek)).symm ▸ (Nat.mod_add_div k 2).symm
             rw [this]; ring
          have hm0 : 0 < m := by
             cases m
             · simp [this] at h3; contradiction
             · exact Nat.succ_pos _
          have hm : m < n := by linarith
          have h2m : 2 * m + 1 < n := by linarith
          rw [this, h₅ m hm0, ih (2*m+1) h2m (by linarith), ih m hm hm0]
          simp [g, Nat.digits_def]
          have : (4*m+3)%2 = 1 := by omega
          have : (4*m+3)/2 = 2*m+1 := by omega
          have : (2*m+1)%2 = 1 := by omega
          have : (2*m+1)/2 = m := by omega
          simp [this, Nat.digits_def]
          simp [List.reverse_cons, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]
          ring
  rw [Finset.filter_congr (fun n hn => by rw [hg n (Finset.mem_Icc.1 hn).1])]
  exact (by native_decide)

let rec g (n : ℕ) : ℕ :=
    if h1 : n < 2 then n
    else if h3 : n = 3 then 3
    else if h2 : n % 2 = 0 then g (n / 2)
    else if h4 : n % 4 = 1 then 2 * g (2 * (n / 4) + 1) - g (n / 4)
    else 3 * g (2 * (n / 4) + 1) - 2 * g (n / 4)
    termination_by n
    decreasing_by all_goals try simp_wf; try omega

  have h_eq (n : ℕ) (h_pos : 0 < n) : f n = g n := by
    induction n using Nat.strongInductionOn with | h n ih =>
    unfold g
    split_ifs with h1 h3 h2 h4
    · interval_cases n <;> simp [h₁, h_pos] at *
    · exact h₂
    · rw [h₃ _ (Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_left (by rw [Nat.mul_comm, ←Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero.1 h2]; exact h_pos : 0 < 2*(n/2)))]
      apply ih; apply Nat.div_lt_self (Nat.lt_of_not_le h1) (by decide)
      exact Nat.div_pos (Nat.le_of_not_lt h1) (by decide)
    · have nk : n / 4 < n := Nat.div_lt_self (Nat.lt_of_not_le h1) (by decide)
      have nk2 : 2 * (n / 4) + 1 < n := by omega
      have k_pos : n / 4 > 0 := by omega
      have : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 1 := (Nat.div_add_mod n 4).symm.trans (by rw [h4]; rfl)
      conv at LHS => rw [this]
      rw [h₄ _ k_pos]
      congr 1
      · apply ih; exact nk2; omega
      · apply ih; exact nk; omega
    · have nk : n / 4 < n := Nat.div_lt_self (Nat.lt_of_not_le h1) (by decide)
      have nk2 : 2 * (n / 4) + 1 < n := by omega
      have k_pos : n / 4 > 0 := by omega
      have : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 3 := (Nat.div_add_mod n 4).symm.trans (by assumption)
      conv at LHS => rw [this]
      rw [h₅ _ k_pos]
      congr 1
      · apply ih; exact nk2; omega
      · apply ih; exact nk; omega

  rw [Finset.filter_congr (fun n h => by rw [h_eq n (Finset.mem_Icc.1 h).1])]
  native_decide

let rev (n : ℕ) := Nat.ofDigits 2 (Nat.digits 2 n).reverse
  have h_rev : ∀ n, 0 < n → f n = rev n := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    have two_gt_1 : 1 < 2 := by norm_num
    if h1 : n = 1 then simp [h1, h₁, rev]; rfl
    else if h3 : n = 3 then simp [h3, h₂, rev]; rfl
    else if h_even : n % 2 = 0 then
      have h_div : n / 2 < n := Nat.div_lt_self hn two_gt_1
      have h_pos : 0 < n / 2 := Nat.div_pos (Nat.le_of_dvd hn (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h_even)) two_gt_1
      rw [←Nat.mul_div_cancel' (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h_even), h₃ _ h_pos, ih _ h_div h_pos]
      dsimp [rev]; rw [Nat.digits_add 2 0 (n/2) two_gt_1 (Or.inl h_pos)]
      simp [Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]
    else
      let m := n / 4
      have hm : m < n := Nat.div_lt_self hn (by norm_num)
      have hm0 : 0 < m := by
        apply Nat.pos_of_ne_zero; intro z; rw [z] at hm
        have : n < 4 := by omega
        have : n % 2 ≠ 0 := by omega
        interval_cases n <;> contradiction
      have h2m1 : 2 * m + 1 < n := by omega
      have h_digits (k : ℕ) : Nat.digits 2 (2 * k + 1) = 1 :: Nat.digits 2 k := 
        Nat.digits_add 2 1 k two_gt_1 (Or.inr (by norm_num))
      rw [ih m hm hm0, ih (2 * m + 1) h2m1 (by omega)]
      dsimp [rev]
      rw [h_digits m, List.reverse_cons, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]
      simp only [List.length_reverse, add_zero, mul_one]
      if h_mod4 : n % 4 = 1 then
        have : n = 4 * m + 1 := (Nat.div_add_mod n 4).symm.trans (congr_arg _ h_mod4)
        rw [this, h₄ m hm0]
        rw [h_digits (2 * m), Nat.digits_add 2 0 m two_gt_1 (Or.inl hm0)]
        simp [List.reverse_cons, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton, add_assoc, mul_add]
        ring
      else
        have : n = 4 * m + 3 := by
          have : n % 4 = 3 := by omega
          exact (Nat.div_add_mod n 4).symm.trans (congr_arg _ this)
        rw [this, h₅ m hm0]
        rw [h_digits (2 * m + 1), h_digits m]
        simp [List.reverse_cons, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton, add_assoc, mul_add]
        ring
  rw [Finset.filter_congr (fun n h => by rw [h_rev n (Finset.mem_Icc.mp h).1])]
  native_decide

let g (n : ℕ) := Nat.ofDigits 2 (Nat.digits 2 n).reverse
  have hg : ∀ n, 0 < n → f n = g n := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
      rw [Nat.digits_def]
      if h1 : n = 1 then simp [h1, h₁, g]
      else if h3 : n = 3 then simp [h3, h₂, g]; rfl
      else if he : n % 2 = 0 then
        have hdiv : n / 2 < n := Nat.div_lt_self hn (by decide)
        have hpos : 0 < n / 2 := Nat.div_pos (Nat.le_of_not_lt (fun h => by simp [h] at h1 he)) (by decide)
        rw [← Nat.mul_div_cancel' he, h₃ _ hpos, ih _ hdiv hpos]
        simp [g, Nat.digits_def, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.mul_div_cancel' he]
      else
        have hk : n / 4 < n := Nat.div_lt_self hn (by decide)
        have hk0 : 0 < n / 4 := by
          refine Nat.div_pos ?_ (by decide)
          by_contra h; replace h := Nat.lt_of_div_eq_zero h
          interval_cases n <;> contradiction
        let k := n / 4
        have h_odd : n % 4 = 1 ∨ n % 4 = 3 := by
             have := Nat.mod_two_of_bodd (Nat.bodd n); rw [← Nat.mod_mul_left_mod n 2 2] at this
             have : n % 2 = 1 := by rw [this]; simp only [Nat.bodd]; split <;> simp at he <;> contradiction
             omega
        have h_len : (Nat.digits 2 k).reverse.length = (Nat.digits 2 k).length := List.length_reverse _
        have h_rev_k : g k = Nat.ofDigits 2 (Nat.digits 2 k).reverse := rfl
        have h_rev_2k1 : g (2 * k + 1) = g k + 2 ^ (Nat.digits 2 k).length := by
          simp [g, Nat.digits_def, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.add_mod]
        rcases h_odd with h41 | h43
        · rw [← Nat.div_add_mod n 4, h41, h₄ _ hk0]
          have h_g : g (4 * k + 1) = g k + 2 * 2 ^ (Nat.digits 2 k).length := by
            simp [g, Nat.digits_def, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.add_mod]
            ring_nf; rfl
          rw [ih _ (by omega) (by omega), ih _ hk hk0, h_rev_2k1, h_g]
          ring
        · rw [← Nat.div_add_mod n 4, h43, h₅ _ hk0]
          have h_g : g (4 * k + 3) = g k + 3 * 2 ^ (Nat.digits 2 k).length := by
            simp [g, Nat.digits_def, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.add_mod]
            ring_nf; rfl
          rw [ih _ (by omega) (by omega), ih _ hk hk0, h_rev_2k1, h_g]
          ring
  rw [Finset.filter_congr (fun n hn => by rw [hg n (Finset.mem_Icc.1 hn).1])]
  have h_pal : ∀ n, g n = n ↔ (Nat.digits 2 n).Palindrome := fun n => by
    dsimp [g]; constructor
    · intro h; rw [← h]; exact List.palindrome_of_reverse_eq (Nat.ofDigits_digits _ _ ▸ rfl)
    · intro h; rw [h.reverse_eq, Nat.ofDigits_digits]
  simp_rw [h_pal]
  native_decide

let g (n : ℕ) := Nat.ofDigits 2 (Nat.digits 2 n).reverse
  have hg : ∀ n, 0 < n → f n = g n := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    match n, hn with
    | 1, _ => simp [g]; exact h₁
    | 3, _ => simp [g]; exact h₂
    | n, hn =>
      if he : n % 2 = 0 then
        let k := n / 2
        have : n = 2 * k := (Nat.div_add_mod n 2).symm.trans (by simp [he])
        rw [this, h₃ k (by linarith), ih k (by linarith) (by linarith)]
        simp [g, Nat.digits_def 2 (2 * k), Nat.digits_def 2 k, he, List.reverse_cons, Nat.ofDigits_append]
      else
        have hodd : n % 2 = 1 := Nat.mod_two_ne_zero.mpr he
        let k := n / 4
        if h4 : n % 4 = 1 then
          have : n = 4 * k + 1 := (Nat.div_add_mod n 4).symm.trans (by simp [h4])
          rw [this, h₄ k (by linarith), ih k (by linarith) (by linarith), ih (2*k+1) (by linarith) (by linarith)]
          simp [g]
          rw [Nat.digits_def 2 (4*k+1), Nat.digits_def 2 (2*k+1), Nat.digits_def 2 (2*k)]
          simp [h4, hodd, Nat.mod_mul_right, Nat.div_add_self, List.reverse_cons, Nat.ofDigits_append]
          ring
        else
          have h43 : n % 4 = 3 := by
             have := Nat.mod_mul_left_mod n 2 2
             rw [hodd] at this
             generalize hq : n % 4 = q at h4 this
             match q with
             | 0 => contradiction | 1 => contradiction | 2 => contradiction | 3 => rfl
             | _ + 4 => have := Nat.mod_lt n (by norm_num : 0 < 4); rw [hq] at this; linarith
          have : n = 4 * k + 3 := (Nat.div_add_mod n 4).symm.trans (by simp [h43])
          rw [this, h₅ k (by linarith), ih k (by linarith) (by linarith), ih (2*k+1) (by linarith) (by linarith)]
          simp [g]
          rw [Nat.digits_def 2 (4*k+3), Nat.digits_def 2 (2*k+1), Nat.digits_def 2 (2*k)]
          simp [h43, hodd, Nat.mod_mul_right, Nat.div_add_self, List.reverse_cons, Nat.ofDigits_append]
          ring
  rw [Finset.filter_congr (fun n hn => by rw [hg n (Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn).1])]
  native_decide

let mirror (n : ℕ) : ℕ := Nat.ofDigits 2 (Nat.digits 2 n).reverse
  have h_mirror_add (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≠ 0) :
      mirror (2 * n + 1) = mirror n + 2 ^ (Nat.digits 2 n).length := by
    simp [mirror, Nat.digits_def, hn, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]
  have h_mirror_mul (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≠ 0) : mirror (2 * n) = mirror n := by
    simp [mirror, Nat.digits_def, hn, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]
  have f_eq (n : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) : f n = mirror n := by
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    rcases n with _ | n; · contradiction
    rcases n with _ | n; · simp [mirror, h₁]; rfl
    rcases n with _ | n; · rw [show 2 = 2 * 1 by rfl, h₃ 1 (by norm_num), h₁]; simp [mirror]; rfl
    rcases n with _ | n; · simp [mirror, h₂]; rfl
    let n := n + 4
    have n_ge_4 : 4 ≤ n := by linarith
    if h_even : n % 2 = 0 then
      let k := n / 2
      have hk : k < n := Nat.div_lt_self (by linarith) (by norm_num)
      have kp : 0 < k := by linarith [Nat.div_pos (by linarith) (by norm_num : 0 < 2)]
      rw [← Nat.mul_div_cancel' h_even, h₃ k kp, ih k hk kp, h_mirror_mul k (by linarith)]
    else
      have n_odd : n % 2 = 1 := Nat.mod_eq_one_of_ne_zero_of_odd h_even (by simp)
      let k := n / 4
      have hk : k < n := Nat.div_lt_self (by linarith) (by norm_num)
      have kp : 0 < k := by linarith [Nat.div_pos (by linarith) (by norm_num : 0 < 4)]
      if h_mod4 : n % 4 = 1 then
        have eq : n = 4 * k + 1 := (Nat.div_add_mod n 4).symm.trans (by rw [h_mod4]; rfl)
        rw [eq, h₄ k kp, ih (2 * k + 1) (by linarith) (by linarith), ih k hk kp,
            h_mirror_add k (by linarith)]
        simp [mirror, Nat.digits_def, kp.ne', Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]
        ring
      else
        have h_mod4 : n % 4 = 3 := by
          have h : n % 4 < 4 := Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)
          have h_odd : n % 4 % 2 = 1 := by rw [Nat.mod_mul_left_mod, n_odd]
          revert h h_odd h_mod4
          generalize n % 4 = m
          decide
        have eq : n = 4 * k + 3 := (Nat.div_add_mod n 4).symm.trans (by rw [h_mod4]; rfl)
        rw [eq, h₅ k kp, ih (2 * k + 1) (by linarith) (by linarith), ih k hk kp,
            h_mirror_add k (by linarith)]
        simp [mirror, Nat.digits_def, kp.ne', Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]
        ring
  rw [Finset.filter_congr (fun n hn => by rw [f_eq n (Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn).1])]
  native_decide
